description: Go module calling ParseAcceptLanguage from golang.org/x/text v0.3.7, which is the vulnerable function for CVE-2022-32149 (GO-2022-1059). govulncheck confirms the function is called.

findings.human_justification: govulncheck confirms ParseAcceptLanguage is called from main, tracing the vulnerability to user code. The vulnerable function is directly invoked.
